tracks.meaning: to telephone someone or make contact with them by phone
to shout or cry out loudly to get someone's attention
a demand by an audience for a performer to come back on stage, typically by shouting 'call'
an official's decision or announcement regarding a rule or outcome in a game
a strong demand or need for a product or service
an option giving the holder the right to buy an asset at a specified price within a set time
a legal profession or the act of being admitted to practice law as a barrister
to match a bet made by another player in poker or similar card games
a characteristic sound or cry made by an animal to communicate with others

one's profession, vocation, or what someone is destined to do in life
a summoning of a doctor or emergency services to attend to a patient
to go and collect someone or something from a particular location
